title: geum montanum f. minus
intro: Geum montanum f. minus, also known as alpine avens or mountain avens, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Rosaceae family. Traditionally, Geum montanum f. minus has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Geum montanum f. minus can be prepared into teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal purposes, and it is also used in some cosmetic products for its skin-soothing properties.
